race.comment: SURPRISE HONEY (15) was handy enough on the turn but couldn't quite finish it off when fifth in a Class 6 over this distance at Doomben a fortnight ago. Fitter for two runs back from a spell and has never missed the frame in four visits to Eagle Farm. Tough to beat with C Williams taking over. SOOTHSAYER (8) is having his third run back after nearly three years off the scene. Shuffled back mid-race then worked home well for fourth last time out in a comparable race to this at the Gold Coast. Has enough improvement still in the tank to give this a shake. CASPERNOVA (7) did his best work late to get up for fourth in the same race as SURPRISE HONEY at Doomben recently. The winner of two from three at this stage of the prep. Nicely placed to play a key role. TOWN CRIER (6) resumed with a tough all-the-way win over 1100m at Ipswich last start. Harder this time but he goes well here at the 1200m. NOW IS THE HOUR (9) draws a better gate today and looks ready to peak fourth-up.
